← All sub-series examples

Sub-series — a race struck for one fleet only (single-competitor heat)

Per-fleet race exclusion; the heat is dropped from the affected fleet's points, race count, and discards

Scoring system: SCRATCH · Discards: No discards.

Overall standings

RankNameSail #R1R2R3TotalNet
1 Alpha One 301 11 2 2
2 Alpha Two 302 22 4 4
1 Bravo One 401 112 4 4
2 Bravo Two 402 221 5 5
3 Bravo Three 403 333 9 9
